name: prism
description: Create domain-expert analysis agents by composing structured instruments: lenses, frames, models, stances, and heuristics.

interface.longDescription: Prism provides a catalog of structured analytical instruments: lenses, frames, models, stances, and heuristics. Use its skills to search the catalog, prepare instruments for subagents, create new instruments, and run multi-perspective debate workflows.
defaultPrompt: Find Prism instruments for a security review.
Prepare STRIDE and OWASP instruments for analysis.
Create a Prism instrument for a known framework.
